tags.documentation:
0=Dormant (sleep mode)
1= Preparing dosing readiness (wake up; prepare to
operate; wait for start)
2=Normal dosing operation
3=System error pending
4= Purging (SCR dosing system is removing residual
DEF from system prior to shutdown)
5=Protect mode against heat (pressure buildup)
6=Protect mode against cold (defreeze)
7=Shutoff (wait for after-run)
8=Diagnosis (after-run)
9=Service test mode, dosing allowed
10=Service test mode, dosing not allowed
11= Ok to Power Down (SCR dosing system has
complete housekeeping and power may safely
be removed.)
12=Priming (Pressure Buildup)
13=Reserved for future assignment by SAE 14=Error
15=Not available
tags.expression:
CASE(
{[.]System_1_State},
0, "Dormant",
1, "Preparing Dosing",
2, "Normal Dosing",
3, "System Error Pending",
4, "Purging",
5, "Protect Mode Against Heat",
6, "Protect Mode Against Cold",
7, "Shutoff (wait for after run)",
8, "Diagnosis (after run)",
9, "Service Test Mode (dosing allowed)",
10, "Service Test Mode (No dosing)",
11, "Ok to Power Down",
12, "Priming",
13, "Future Use",
14, "Error",
15, "Not Available",
"Unknown")
tags.name: System_1_State_Desc

tags.documentation:
0=Dormant (sleep mode)
1= Preparing dosing readiness (wake up; prepare to
operate; wait for start)
2=Normal dosing operation
3=System error pending
4= Purging (SCR dosing system is removing residual
DEF from system prior to shutdown)
5=Protect mode against heat (pressure buildup)
6=Protect mode against cold (defreeze)
7=Shutoff (wait for after-run)
8=Diagnosis (after-run)
9=Service test mode, dosing allowed
10=Service test mode, dosing not allowed
11= Ok to Power Down (SCR dosing system has
complete housekeeping and power may safely
be removed.)
12=Priming (Pressure Buildup)
13=Reserved for future assignment by SAE 14=Error
15=Not available
tags.name: System_1_State
